Interface IHitTest3D

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that locate a part of a geometry closest to a point.

[Guid("A2FA4E9A-4E10-4A62-9EED-48680A7423DD")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IHitTest3D

Parameters

QueryPoint IPoint
searchRadius double
geometryPart esriGeometryHitPartType
hitPoint IPoint
hitDistance double
hitPartIndex int
hitSegmentIndex int

bool
